twinkle_twinkle.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star
twinkle_twinkle.lyrics: twinkle twinkle little star how i wonder what you are up above the world so high like a diamond in the sky twinkle twinkle little star how i wonder what you are

happy_birthday.title: Happy Birthday
happy_birthday.lyrics: happy birthday to you happy birthday to you happy birthday dear friend happy birthday to you

jingle_bells.title: Jingle Bells
jingle_bells.lyrics: jingle bells jingle bells jingle all the way oh what fun it is to ride in a one horse open sleigh jingle bells jingle bells jingle all the way

mary_had_a_lamb.title: Mary Had a Little Lamb
mary_had_a_lamb.lyrics: mary had a little lamb little lamb little lamb mary had a little lamb its fleece was white as snow

row_your_boat.title: Row Row Row Your Boat
row_your_boat.lyrics: row row row your boat gently down the stream merrily merrily merrily merrily life is but a dream
